blocks.content: She moved her bag off the seat before I even asked. Either very cool or she was expecting someone else.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: You're not going to let that go.

blocks.speaker: Keisha
blocks.content: So how do you know Jonathan Michaels?

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: We grew up in the same neighborhood. Friends since middle school.

blocks.speaker: Keisha
blocks.content: I'm just saying mm. That's not a crime.

blocks.speaker: Keisha
blocks.content: Whether you're actually his boy or just somebody who rides with him.
Across the cafeteria, Jonathan looked up, scanned the room, found me sitting here. Registered it. Moved on. No nod.

blocks.prompt: Keisha is still watching. Maya is waiting to see what you do with that.

options.label: Turn back to Maya. Don't engage.
